economic_notes: Flying Post First Nation owns Flying Post Development LP and Flying Post Development General Partner Inc. Flying Post Development LP holds 50.9% in Flying Post Camp Logistics LP and 51% in Flying Post Camp and Logistics Inc. Flying Post Development LP distributed $9,853,000 to the First Nation during the year. Various mining agreements with Pan American Silver Corp., Newmont Goldcorp, and other exploration companies.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Prior year (2021) included a TLE Land Claim Settlement of $17,265,768 which was a large one-time item in the comparative year. The 2021 Band Support expenses of $23,056,912 were unusually high, likely related to the TLE settlement distribution. Tangible capital assets net book value not explicitly stated on the face of the balance sheet in the provided text. Note 17 references restatements to prior year figures related to capital assets constructed. The consolidated entity includes Flying Post Holdings Inc., Flying Post Development LP, and Flying Post General Partner Inc. The Investment Fund balance of $250,000 is held in trust by Wabun Tribal Council.
